articles.author: Susan Svrluga, Laura Meckler, Todd Wallack
articles.title: DOJ says Yale medical school discriminated against Asian, White applicants - The Washington Post
articles.description: An investigation concluded that Yale School of Medicine favored Black and Hispanic applicants. The Justice Department sent similar findings to UCLA last week.
articles.content:
The Justice Department on Thursday accused Yale School of Medicine of discriminating based on race in its admissions, byfavoring Black and Hispanic applicants over White and Asian ones. 
The departm… [+391 chars]

articles.author: James Doubek
articles.title: Researchers unearth Southeast Asia's largest dinosaur - NPR
articles.description: They're calling it the "last titan" of Thailand. The sauropod — an herbivore with a long neck and tail — comes from the late Early Cretaceous period, some 100 to 120 million years ago.
articles.content:
Researchers have identified a new species of dinosaur in Thailand, the largest found in Southeast Asia.
It would have been about 90 feet long and weighed some 30 tons, according to research publishe… [+3112 chars]
